presets.input: We need a one-page kickoff brief for a new client website. Clarify goals, deliverables, exclusions, approvals, and launch timing before design starts.
presets.subtitle: Scope the engagement.
presets.title: Client kickoff

presets.input: We need a short memo for leadership on whether to merge the pricing and plans pages. Summarize tradeoffs, recommendation, risks, and what changes next.
presets.subtitle: Frame the recommendation.
presets.title: Leadership decision

presets.input: We just launched the customer portal. Capture what shipped, known issues, support notes, and who owns the follow-up work.
presets.subtitle: Wrap the release cleanly.
presets.title: Launch handoff

presets.subtitle: We’ll do it live! Thing works!
presets.title: Try it for yourself

templates.done: Deliverables accepted, review loop confirmed, timeline agreed
templates.outcome: Align the engagement before the work spreads
templates.summary: A one-pager that sets expectations before design or development begins.
templates.title: Spring Campaign Brief

templates.done: Decision recorded, owners aligned, next review scheduled
templates.outcome: Document the choice, tradeoffs, and immediate follow-through
templates.summary: A concise memo that explains the call and what changes because of it.
templates.title: Navigation Restructure

templates.done: Launch shipped, risks closed, handoff notes captured
templates.outcome: Summarize what shipped and what still needs watching
templates.scope: Release notes, issues, follow-up owners, support handoff
templates.summary: A quick post-launch page for handoff, support, and follow-through.
templates.title: Portal Launch Recap

templates.done: Core idea clarified, weak language cut, sharper phrasing chosen
templates.outcome: Tighten the language until the thinking is obvious
templates.summary: A language-first pass for sharpening what the page is actually trying to say.
templates.title: Language Clarity Pass

templates.done: Weak spots exposed, vague claims challenged, revision priorities obvious
templates.outcome: Pressure-test the draft and surface what still is not good enough
templates.summary: A harsher review template for improving the quality of the page before it ships.
templates.title: Uncomfortable Review

templates.done: Approved launch, signed-off content, stable post-launch handoff
templates.outcome: Ship the relaunch with aligned scope and review expectations
templates.scope: Homepage, navigation, CMS content migration, QA
templates.summary: A clear launch brief for the external client and internal delivery team.
templates.title: Client Site Relaunch
